summary: Completed testing of Iteration 17 features: (1) Playing XI background fetch with polling pattern - POST returns immediately with status=started, GET /status returns running/done/error. (2) Form factor damping - small sample (1W-0L) has ~20% of the logit contribution compared to large sample (5W-0L). (3) RR vs GT (ipl2026_009) now correctly shows GT winning at 68.8% (was incorrectly showing RR winning before fix). (4) Consultation returns realistic simulation probs and edge_reasons. (5) Player impact includes buzz_score and buzz_reason fields. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.

issues: Minor React warning: textTransform prop on DOM element - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_008/playing-xi returns immediately (<5s) with status=started
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_008/playing-xi/status returns status field (idle/running/done/error)
Backend: Form factor damping - small sample (1W-0L) logit is <50% of large sample (5W-0L) logit
Backend: RR vs GT (ipl2026_009) prediction shows GT winning at ~68.8% (not RR)
Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_008/consult returns realistic simulation probs (not 100/0)
Backend: Consultation returns edge_reasons array when market odds provided
Backend: Player impact includes buzz_score (-100 to +100) and buzz_reason fields
Backend: API root endpoint returns health info
Backend: Schedule endpoint returns matches
Backend: Predictions/upcoming endpoint returns predictions
Frontend: Home page loads with match cards showing updated predictions
Frontend: RR vs GT card shows GT winning (RR 29% vs GT 71%)
Frontend: Pre-match page shows Factor Breakdown with two-sided green/red bars
Frontend: Factor Breakdown shows H2H, Venue, Form, Squad, Home factors
Frontend: Playing XI section shows 22 buzz score badges (11 per team)
Frontend: Playing XI shows expected runs and expected wickets for each player
Frontend: Consultant Dashboard has risk tolerance toggle and market odds inputs
Frontend: Run Consultation button triggers 50K simulations
Frontend: Simulation Summary shows predicted scores (MI 154 vs DC 182)
Frontend: Verdict section displays winner with confidence badge
Frontend: Edge reasons section shows WHY THIS SIGNAL explanation
Frontend: Player Impact shows players with buzz_score values
Frontend: Match State hidden for upcoming matches (correct behavior)
Frontend: User Guide opens from floating ? button in bottom-left
Frontend: User Guide modal has 10 sections including Playing XI & Players
critical_code_review_comments: Form damping formula correctly implemented: damping = min(1.0, min_games/5.0), then form_adj = 0.5 + (form_pct - 0.5) * damping
Playing XI background fetch pattern correctly implemented with asyncio.create_task() and in-memory task tracking
apply_buzz_and_luck helper correctly maps buzz_score (-100 to +100) to ±20% modifier
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing matches ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) and ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 features fully working. Key changes: (1) Playing XI fetch now uses background task + polling pattern - POST /playing-xi returns immediately with status=started, then poll GET /playing-xi/status until status=done. (2) Form factor damping implemented - with small sample sizes (1-2 games), form logit is regressed toward 50% to prevent overweighting. Formula: damping = min(1.0, min_games/5.0). (3) RR vs GT prediction fixed - GT now correctly shows as winning (~68-71%) due to better H2H, venue, and squad factors. (4) Buzz score is -100 to +100 sentiment scale with buzz_reason explanation.

playing_xi_background_fetch.get_status_response: Returns running/done/error with data when done
playing_xi_background_fetch.timeout: Frontend polls for up to 120s (40 attempts x 3s)

rr_vs_gt_prediction.before: RR was incorrectly winning due to 1W-0L (100%) vs 0W-1L (0%) form
rr_vs_gt_prediction.after: GT now winning at 68.8% due to better H2H (6-2), venue (home), squad factors
rr_vs_gt_prediction.damping_effect: Form factor now properly damped for small sample sizes

consultation_simulation.edge_reasons: Returns array of explanations when market odds provided
